meaning: n.细长的茎,藤条vt.以杖击,以藤编制
examples: In his hand, he carried a gold-tipped cane.
He stopped, shifting his cane to his left hand.
The main plants that are used for biofuel production now are sugar cane, corn.
In October 2011, Borawski walked to her mailbox without a cane for the first time.
He still looks somewhat frail, relying on a cane and using a wheelchair and walker occasionally.
